## What this changes

## Checklist

- [ ] Bug fix (encouraged) — includes a regression test
- [ ] Feature — discussed and agreed in an issue first (undiscussed feature
      PRs are usually declined on scope grounds; see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Behavioral or design change — context, decision, and consequences
      stated in the description above
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks pass (gitleaks, ruff check, ruff format, ty)
- [ ] No comments or docstrings introduced — prose lives in the README, the
      docs, and the PR description
